changeSet.author: mosque-crm
changeSet.comment: Fix configurations unique constraint to support per-organization overrides. Drops the name-only unique constraint and replaces it with a composite (name, organization_id) unique index so that: - Global settings remain unique per name (organization_id IS NULL) - Each tenant can have its own override per key (name + organization_id unique pair)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE configurations DROP INDEX IF EXISTS uq_configurations_name
